mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bottles (user_id, content, image_url) VALUES (#{userId}, #{content}, #{imageUrl})
mapper.select: SELECT b.*, u1.username, u2.username as picked_username FROM bottles b LEFT JOIN users u1 ON b.user_id = u1.id LEFT JOIN users u2 ON b.picked_user_id = u2.id WHERE b.id = #{id}
SELECT b.*, u.username FROM bottles b LEFT JOIN users u ON b.user_id = u.id WHERE b.is_picked = 0 AND b.user_id != #{excludeUserId} ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT 1

SELECT b.*, u1.username, u2.username as picked_username FROM bottles b LEFT JOIN users u1 ON b.user_id = u1.id LEFT JOIN users u2 ON b.picked_user_id = u2.id WHERE b.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY b.created_at DESC

SELECT b.*, u1.username, u2.username as picked_username FROM bottles b LEFT JOIN users u1 ON b.user_id = u1.id LEFT JOIN users u2 ON b.picked_user_id = u2.id WHERE b.picked_user_id = #{pickedUserId} ORDER BY b.picked_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE bottles SET content = #{content}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, is_picked = #{isPicked}, picked_user_id = #{pickedUserId}, picked_at = #{pickedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
